message:
🐛 Fix test suite regressions: MockStore interface + consistency violations (#1728)

- Add 5 missing Store interface methods to MockStore (GPU utilization
  snapshots + active reservations) that caused Go build failures in
  auth-lifecycle, settings-migration, and websocket-resilience tests
- Guard .join() calls against undefined in useGPUUtilizations.ts
- Add fetch timeout constant (GPU_UTIL_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS) to comply
  with consistency-test fetch-without-timeout rule
- Add test-results/ directory for historical test run tracking

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
